docs.title: Digital Garden
docs.text:
Welcome to my digital garden, as ChatGPT called it Here you can find various resources and informations avout different subjects, from modding (homebrew) to recipes I qill be adding stuff here, hopefully daily as I plan to start yet again the "Album a Day" challenge for 2026 So stick around and write me at: (to be announced)

also, table testing:

First Header Second Header Third Header Left Center Right Left Center Right

also, important links:

https://pawamoy.github.io/mkdocs-gallery/#material-for-mkdocs

https://emeset7.github.io/digital-garden/

docs.title: January
docs.text: 1-7 8-14 15-22 23-31 1970 #5 Center Right roght 1970 #6 Center Right

docs.title: Guidelines
docs.text:
At least an album a day for the week, meaning that each week has a minimum of 7 albums, Saturdays and Sundays may become difficult to research and listen to an album so those 2 albums from those days might be picked up earlier in the week

Research will ve conducted in the "Album of the Year" website, were I will be picking an album from the top 10 to 25 from each year for a diferent decade each 2 months, so: January and February will be 1970s for day 1 lets say I pick one from the top ten of 1970, day 2 from 1971, amd so one without skipping a year so from 1970 to 79 in 60 days, in order, no maximum per year, at least one each year Marxh and April 1980-1989...

Fridays can be used for weakly releases, meaning, if there is an album to be release that week, it can be used as the album for Friday.

Fridays can also be used to a personal pick, aswell as Mondays

Special seasons can be used as a theme for albums, respecting the year and order we are in.

Holidays or/and vacations can be flacky and i might bow even show up, those days het backlogged, they have ro

All albums must be logged and a rating can be given, optional

A favorite song must be picked from each album, multiple is allowed

Musicboard must also ve logged and a Spotify playlist will be updated as soon as possible with the favorites (link for it soon)

Rules will be added as neeeded but never changed or vent, its not a challenge if we modify the rules as we please

docs.title: The ones that really stuck in
docs.text:
To start, 2025 gave me a gut wrenching album "Polar (Traveller's Log)" by Gabriel Ólafs The commentary really males it vone alive, I feel there, alone, freezing What an amazing piece of music

Others should also be mentioned, there are plenty of albums that stuck with me

Also, Kid A, Radiohead, amazing, the best from them

docs.title: F1
docs.text:
This year (2026) I've decided to watch Formula 1 Until it starts I'm going to watch the 2025 season and keep track here of the ones watched and where I left off (can't watch a full race at once)

Also, new rules this year and new engine, got to read more about it to have an idea of the changes and whether if I like it or not

docs.title: Risenhames Fortress
docs.text:
• World: Emeathira "The Eternal Planes"
  • Civilization: The Blotted Construct
  • Fortress: Risenhames
  • Expedition Leader: Lorbam Sharkrings, 55 M

docs.title: Infrastructure
docs.text: Entrance to the fort. Dormitory, small farm plot, still and small workshop (stone and wood work) was established. Dinning hall with metting area was defined and costructed. Stockpiles were implemented. Wood is defined. Pasture is defined as well.

docs.title: Animals
docs.text: Only same sex animals from the species worth breeding, we need to trade some animals in the next trader visit. Some animals have aged.

docs.title: Population
docs.text: Stray dog has matured, bredding of dogs is now possible.

docs.title: Military
docs.text: War dog training into consideration.

docs.title: Infrastructure
docs.text: More rooms were created, a room for pray has been hollowed out but we do not have enough dwarves to pray The butcher shop and trading post will be relocated inside, defenses are a priority even in a seemingly peaceful place, specially after the horse incident Some more workshops were made, the fort is looking a bit confusing, a stair going down was ordered and a more organized fort will be planned out below Offices were also improvised beside our hall, the bookeeper Imush is hard at work

docs.title: Population
docs.text: Some migrantes came, it seems they brough 2 dwarves children, how nice , promply (after some in truth) childern were forbiden of labor. They will age and work for many years, we don't want them to resent the creator for working when still a child Some animals came too, a pet lamb and a donkey. the Lamb is named Eden, a male

docs.title: Military
docs.text: One of the dogs found funny to bit a horse and latching on to him The remainig dogs started to attack the horse, riping it from all types of fat In the confusion, Shorast became a militia commander and recruited 2 more dwarves to take down the horse, thinking it was him that started it all and the dogs were in danger Nil and Zefon followed Shorast and took the horse down, blood and teeth were scatered in the main corridor but it served as a reminder, we need to be ready for the real deal

docs.title: Events
docs.text: The dogs were at a horse again, this time the dwarves let it be as it was far and the horse was just running from here

docs.title: Events
docs.text: Miasma has erupted in the corridor, right by the horse that is dead for months and apparentlly isn't worth taking out to the refuse pile After some more rearranging of the stockpiles the horse body was removed or so is thought because is no longer there A Caravan arrived, time to get some goods and hopefully some more animals for food And a hard realisation hits the fort... We don't have many worthy items, not to say none, we might have to sell of some animals to get the "right" sex ones A bunch of dingos appeared and apparentlly some tried to enter the fort, one was caught in the traps, fortunatelly It's time to hide inside given this "attack", 11 dingos on the loose, 1 more caged The population hidden for a bit but the dingos didn't seem that great of a threat so they will keep an eye of each other but free to work again

docs.title: Infrastrures
docs.text: The downstairs "fort" is going well, is being planned all the way, oak floors, feather wood in the rooms, smooth walls, nice doors (all the same materials). It's going along

docs.title: Trading
docs.text: Some gems were traded for a female donkey The caravan had an intersting scrool but way to expensive for our humble fort for now We requested some yak cows for next year, we might have more goods then and trade in a companion to our male yak

docs.title: Population
docs.text: Some more migrants arrived and soon after all tasks were defined They arrived just in time, more working hands were indeed needed. Dormitory needs an urgent expansion

docs.title: Animals
docs.text: The dogs made puppies, one puppy but, enough for now Soon after 2 more puppies born, it was more that one after all

docs.title: Animals
docs.text: Very uneventful winter, a cat has grown up and the rooms construction on the lower floor is coming along, soon some bed rooms will be assigned Now the dingo, the caged and being trained in our fort one is picking a fight, on the first interaction we stay put but ready, the squad was called Soon after, said dingo, reverted to wild so... time to take it out Some open arteries and severed parts later the dingo is dealt with, all normal again Some stuff happened after all

docs.title: Spring
docs.text: Sping again, nearly a year has passed since our arrival, the fort is coming along

docs.title: Population
docs.text: A child has born, we are now 19 dwarves

docs.title: Animals
docs.text: Some more puppies were born, our war dogs will come alonge after all

docs.title: Mining
docs.text: A starcase down is being made, we hope to discover more minerals and precious stones and in case we reach, a cavern

docs.title: Dwarf Fortress
docs.text:
Here I'm going to post some game stuff but mainly my journal of the forts

Fort: (cant remember the name)
